---
title: "Week 1"
subtitle: "Welcome to POL 051"
editor: visual
---

::: callout-important
Classes begin this week on Monday June 22.

Project Idea due - Fri, June 28
:::

## Prepare

📖 Read the [syllabus](/course-syllabus.html)

📖 Read [Ch.2 in ModernDive on Data Visualization](https://moderndive.com/v2/viz.html)

📖 Read [Ch.1 in R for Data Science](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html)

## Lectures

🖥️[Lecture 1 - Meet + greet; Welcome to POL 051](/slides/lec-1.html)

🖥️[Lecture 2 - Data Visualization I + II](/slides/lec-2.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 3 - Data Wrangling I](/slides/lec-3.html)

## Participation

📋 [AE 1 - R Basics](/ae/files/ae-1-rbasics.qmd){download="ae-1-rbasics.qmd"}

## Lab

⌨️ [Lab 1 - Data Visualization + Data Wrangling I](not-available.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
